---
title: 'About Bulldog Publications'
date: '2040-04-05T04:46:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Bulldog Publications'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '565883152284763291'
blogger_filename: '/2013/04/about-bulldog-publications.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Bulldog Publications/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Updates'
---

<br />
<br />
<div style="line-height: 24px; margin: 20px 0px; padding: 0px;">
<b style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: large;"><u>Who we are:</u></span></b></div>
<div style="line-height: 24px; margin: 20px 0px; padding: 0px;">
<span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: large;"><b>Bulldog Publications</b></span><br />
<span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: large;">Aggressive, Persistent, and Determined to pursue God's BLESSING in this life and beyond.&nbsp;</span></div>
<div style="line-height: 24px; margin: 20px 0px; padding: 0px;">
<b style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: large;"><u>What we do:</u></span></b></div>
<div style="line-height: 24px; margin: 20px 0px; padding: 0px;">
<span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: large;">We self-publish our books and materials that help people enjoy the rich life that God has given us, to empower them to prosper with good success!</span><br />
<span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: large;"><br /></span><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: large;">We are not currently publishing material for other authors but we are investigating that possibility, stay tuned for more information on that.&nbsp;</span></div>
<div style="line-height: 24px; margin: 20px 0px; padding: 0px;">
<b style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-family: Times, 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: large;"><u>Owners and Authors:</u></span></b></div>
<div style="line-height: 24px; margin: 20px 0px; padding: 0px;">
<br />
<div style="margin: 20px 0px; padding: 0px;">
<div style="text-align: center;">
<span class="Apple-style-span" style="font-size: large;"><b>Darrell G. Wolfe and&nbsp;</b><b>Flavia A. Wolfe</b></span></div>
</div>
<div style="margin: 20px 0px; padding: 0px;">
<div style="text-align: center;">
<b>Address: PO Box 1001&nbsp;Newark, TX 76071</b></div>
</div>
<div style="margin: 20px 0px; padding: 0px;">
<div style="text-align: center;">
<b>Phone: (903) 345-5965</b></div>
</div>
<div style="margin: 20px 0px; padding: 0px;">
<div style="text-align: center;">
<b>Email:&nbsp;<a href="mailto:WFConceptions@live.com">WFConceptions@live.com</a></b></div>
<div style="text-align: center;">
<b><br /></b></div>
<div style="text-align: center;">
<b><a href="http://www.bulldogpublications.com/">www.bulldogpublications.com</a></b><br />
<div>
<br /></div>
</div>
</div>
<div style="margin: 20px 0px; padding: 0px;">
<div style="text-align: center;">
</div>
</div>
</div>
